judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "3, ['Request for client’s current monthly housing cost breakdown (mortgage/rent, taxes, utilities, insurance, maintenance)', 'Offer to generate a personalized cost-savings or affordability comparison analysis', 'Transmission of disclosure statements and emailed legal/cost estimate packages directly to the buyer’s email (email-based document delivery)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "12, ['Providing condo property listing with price, size, accessibility features, and included utilities', 'Providing bungalow property listing with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, accessibility features, and maintenance level', 'Indicating availability for viewings with specific date ranges (Nov 26–29, Dec 1–6)', 'Offering to reserve or tentatively book viewing appointments', 'Confirming scheduled viewing for a specific property with date and time', 'Including accessibility-focused walk-through and energy-efficient upgrades in viewing features', 'Listing legal service provider recommendations for cash purchase closings', 'Providing estimated legal and closing costs (lawyer fees, taxes, insurance, disbursements)', 'Listing required documentation such as proof of funds, ID, inspection reports, title insurance', 'Offering moving service packages with cost, service level, and availability details', 'Offering utility setup packages with scope (gas, electricity, water, internet, smart home) and cost', 'Offering to compile a total downsizing and relocation package summary for review']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Request for client’s current monthly housing cost breakdown (mortgage/rent, taxes, utilities, insurance, maintenance)', 'Offer to generate a personalized cost-savings or affordability comparison analysis', 'Transmission of disclosure statements and emailed legal/cost estimate packages directly to the buyer’s email (email-based document delivery)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 12, ['Providing condo property listing with price, size, accessibility features, and included utilities', 'Providing bungalow property listing with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, accessibility features, and maintenance level', 'Indicating availability for viewings with specific date ranges (Nov 26–29, Dec 1–6)', 'Offering to reserve or tentatively book viewing appointments', 'Confirming scheduled viewing for a specific property with date and time', 'Including accessibility-focused walk-through and energy-efficient upgrades in viewing features', 'Listing legal service provider recommendations for cash purchase closings', 'Providing estimated legal and closing costs (lawyer fees, taxes, insurance, disbursements)', 'Listing required documentation such as proof of funds, ID, inspection reports, title insurance', 'Offering moving service packages with cost, service level, and availability details', 'Offering utility setup packages with scope (gas, electricity, water, internet, smart home) and cost', 'Offering to compile a total downsizing and relocation package summary for review']
